title: Two Arrested After Horse Struck by Car in Uptown Charlotte
summary: Two individuals were arrested following an incident where a horse was struck by a car near 7th and College Street.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential traffic safety issues and animal welfare concerns in the Uptown area.

title: CMPD Officer Charged with DWI in Stanly County
summary: A CMPD officer, Dylan Auch, was arrested in Locust for driving while impaired and an expired vehicle registration.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about accountability and conduct within the Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department.

title: Man Charged After Arson Threat at Burke County Business
summary: A suspect is facing charges after allegedly threatening to burn down a Burke County business after pouring gasoline.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the potential for violent crime and the impact on local businesses and community safety.

title: Church Treasurer Accused of Stealing $80,000
summary: Hope Corley, a church treasurer, is accused of embezzling $80,000 from a Lincoln County Baptist church between June 2025 and February 2026.
charlotte_impact: Undermines trust in religious institutions and highlights the potential for financial crimes within organizations.

title: Abandoned Puppies Reunited with Mother
summary: Eight puppies found abandoned in Gaston County were reunited with their mother; charges are pending against a suspect.
charlotte_impact: Showcases animal cruelty prevention and the positive outcome of reuniting animals with their families.

title: Suspect Surrenders in Crowded Parking Lot Shooting
summary: Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr. surrendered to Kings Mountain police after allegedly firing shots in a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses gun violence and the potential for mass casualties in public spaces.

title: CATS Blue Line Single-Tracking for South End Station Construction
summary: Charlotte Area Transit System riders will experience service disruptions from April 19 to May 8 due to Blue Line construction.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about upcoming transportation delays and the impact of infrastructure projects.

title: Kannapolis Man Charged with Murder in Deadly Assault
summary: Brian Menzies faces felony charges related to the death of Daliely Amparo on April 5 in Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a serious violent crime and its impact on the community.

title: Man Charged with Possessing 'Weapon of Mass Destruction'
summary: A man is charged after a Claremont home explosion on April 1 injured two people; he possessed a 'weapon of mass destruction'.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of illegal weapons and the potential for catastrophic damage.

title: Pet Adoption Tryouts Offered by CMPD Animal Care & Control
summary: CMPD Animal Care & Control is offering trial periods of up to 10 days for pet adoptions.
charlotte_impact: Promotes animal welfare and responsible pet ownership within the community.

title: Emergency Crews Respond to Gas Leak in East Charlotte
summary: Piedmont Natural Gas is working to repair a gas leak on Brawley Lane in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses potential safety hazards and infrastructure maintenance issues.

title: Patchy Frost Then Warmup Begins
summary: Light frost expected Thursday morning, followed by a warmup with temperatures reaching the mid-80s this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather updates and forecasts for the local area.

title: Aging Population Shrinks US Workforce Participation
summary: Fewer workers could slow economic growth, even with healthy job growth and a declining unemployment rate.
charlotte_impact: Discusses broader economic trends and their potential impact on the local workforce.

title: Mooresville Mayor Refuses to Step Down
summary: Mooresville Mayor Chris Carney says he will not resign despite a no-confidence vote and requests from town commissioners.
charlotte_impact: Reports on local political issues and leadership challenges.

title: Suspect Incompetent for Trial in Zarutska Murder Case
summary: Decarlos Brown, accused of fatally stabbing Iryna Zarutska, has been deemed incompetent to stand trial.
charlotte_impact: Addresses legal proceedings and mental health considerations in a high-profile murder case.
